input.code:
# Load libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read counts and metadata
counts_df <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata_df <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

# Convert to integer matrix (DESeq2 requires integer counts)
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts_df)
counts_matrix <- apply(counts_matrix, 2, as.integer)
rownames(counts_matrix) <- rownames(counts_df)

cat("Counts matrix: ", nrow(counts_matrix), " genes x ", ncol(counts_matrix), " cells\n")
cat("Sample table:\n")
print(table(metadata_df$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_matrix,
  colData = metadata_df,
  design = ~ cell_type
)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created with design: ~ cell_type\n")
cat("Levels: ", levels(dds$cell_type), "\n")
